evals.name: system-workflow-coverage
evals.prompt: Run sdlc-test in SYSTEM mode (/sdlc:test) against the complete docs/ chain in this project (PRD.yaml, DATA-MODEL.yaml, ARCH.yaml, plus API.yaml + API__* and UX.yaml + UX__* enrichers — all status: complete). For every multiple-choice question pick the recommended (position-1) option; for free-text give a one-line plausible answer; accept inferred pre-fills as proposed; skip optional themes at the gate. Then write docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml and run validate_schema.py until it validates. The product is a small web app task tracker (tinytrack) with a weekly digest. KEY CANARIES: (1) Workflow coverage is GATED — WKF-001 (create/triage a task), WKF-002 (comment + close), and WKF-003 (configure digest + review runs) are each traced by >=2 ARCH containers (web-frontend + backend-api; WKF-003 also digest-worker), so each MUST be covered by at least one system test (e2e or contract) whose `covers` names it, OR deferred via a WRN-NNN. The validator HARD-fails on an uncovered cross-container workflow. (2) The system file carries the GLOBAL policy every container inherits: test_approach.pyramid_targets, coverage_threshold.line_pct, mock_policy and fixture_strategy are all required. (3) Every test is a unique TST-NNN item with non-empty directives, a `covers` list of FR/NFR/ACR/WKF ids that resolve to PRD, `involves_containers` that resolve to ARCH container_ids, a priority and an acceptance line. Do NOT author per-container unit tests here — those belong in container mode.
evals.expected_output: docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml with test_approach.pyramid_targets set, coverage_threshold.line_pct set, mock_policy and fixture_strategy set, and a tests[] list of system-scoped tests (tiers in e2e/contract/load/security/accessibility). WKF-001, WKF-002 and WKF-003 each appear in some test's `covers` OR are deferred via a WRN-NNN in test_strategy_warnings. Every tst_id matches TST-NNN and is unique; every `covers` entry is an FR/NFR/ACR/WKF id resolving to a PRD id; every `involves_containers` entry is an ARCH container_id; every test_strategy_warnings entry starts with WRN-NNN. metadata.status == complete and metadata.changelog has >=1 entry. validate_schema.py exits 0 with [OK] complete (workflow coverage + ID formats + trace integrity all pass).

assertions.text: docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml exists and can be parsed as valid YAML
metadata.status == 'complete'
metadata.changelog contains at least one entry
test_approach.pyramid_targets is present and non-empty
coverage_threshold.line_pct is present and is a number
mock_policy is present and non-empty
fixture_strategy is present and non-empty
Every tst_id in tests[] matches the pattern TST-\d{3,} and is unique across the file
Every test item has a non-empty directives list (at least one directive string)
Every test item has a non-empty covers list
Every entry in every test's covers[] is a recognizable PRD id (matches FR-\d+, NFR-\d+, WKF-\d+, ACR-\d+, or JTB-\d+)
Every entry in every test's involves_containers[] matches a container_id that exists in ARCH.yaml containers[]
Every test item has a non-empty priority field
Every test item has a non-empty acceptance field
WKF-001 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
WKF-002 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
WKF-003 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
Every entry in test_strategy_warnings[] matches the pattern ^WRN-\d{3,}:\s+.+
No test in the system file is tier 'unit' (unit tests belong in container mode, not system mode)
validate_schema.py exits with code 0 when run against docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml

The prd_warnings WRN-001 (digest idempotency / double-send risk on FR-005) is addressed: either a system-level test's covers[] includes FR-005 or a note about double-send, OR a WRN-NNN deferral in test_strategy_warnings[] references the idempotency / double-send risk

The PRD edge case EDG-001 (digest run with zero open tasks) is addressed: either a test's description or acceptance references the zero-task scenario, OR a WRN-NNN deferral in test_strategy_warnings[] names EDG-001 or the zero-open-tasks condition
The system tests[] list contains more than one test (the suite is not collapsed to a single test covering everything)
WKF-001, WKF-002, and WKF-003 are each covered by distinct tests (no single test is the only entry covering all three workflows at once)
At least one test uses tier 'e2e' (cross-container workflow tests warrant e2e tier)
NFR-001 (p95 task-list latency) is addressed by at least one test whose covers[] includes NFR-001, or deferred via a WRN-NNN

evals.name: container-coverage-gate
evals.prompt: Run sdlc-test in CONTAINER mode for the `backend-api` container (equivalent to `/sdlc:test backend-api`). The project has a complete, validator-clean upstream chain (PRD.yaml, DATA-MODEL.yaml, ARCH.yaml + ARCH__backend-api.yaml, all status: complete) and an existing complete docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml whose global policy (pyramid, coverage floor, mock/fixture defaults) this container inherits. For every multiple-choice question pick the recommended (position-1) option; for free-text give a one-line plausible answer; accept inferred pre-fills as proposed; skip optional themes at the gate. Decompose backend-api's components into a unit/integration suite plus the risk-driven negative cases, then write docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml and run validate_schema.py until it validates. KEY CANARIES (the trace-or-defer coverage gate — each HARD-fails if violated): (1) backend-api implements FR-001..FR-004; every one must appear in some test's `covers` OR be deferred via a WRN-NNN. (2) backend-api does NOT implement FR-005 (that belongs to digest-worker) — a test whose `covers` names FR-005 is rejected because it is not in the container's/components' implements_requirements. (3) Components `tasks-controller` and `digest-settings-controller` each declare acceptance_criteria — each must be targeted by >=1 test via `component_ref` (or deferred). (4) Every unit-tier test MUST set `component_ref` to a real components[].component_id from ARCH__backend-api.yaml. (5) The failure_modes id `postgres-unavailable` must be exercised by a test (`targets_failure_mode`) or deferred; the security_concerns ids `jwt-forgery` and `pii-in-logs` must each be exercised (`targets_security_concern`) or deferred. (6) Every tst_id is TST-NNN, unique within this file.
evals.expected_output: docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml with container_id: backend-api, an overview, a coverage_target, and a non-empty tests[] list. FR-001..FR-004 each appear in some test's `covers` (or are deferred via WRN-NNN); no test covers FR-005. tasks-controller and digest-settings-controller are each named by some test's `component_ref` (or deferred). Every unit-tier test has a `component_ref` resolving to a component in ARCH__backend-api.yaml. postgres-unavailable, jwt-forgery and pii-in-logs are each exercised by a test's targets_failure_mode/targets_security_concern (or deferred). Every tst_id matches TST-NNN and is unique; every test_strategy_warnings entry starts with WRN-NNN; metadata.status == complete with >=1 changelog entry. backend-api is registered in TEST-STRATEGY.yaml.container_strategies[]. validate_schema.py exits 0 with [OK] complete (requirement + acceptance + risk coverage, component_ref/targets integrity, ID formats all pass).

assertions.text: docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml exists and can be parsed as valid YAML
container_id == 'backend-api'
metadata.status == 'complete'
metadata.changelog contains at least one entry
overview is present and non-empty
coverage_target is present (at minimum coverage_target.line_pct is set)
Every tst_id in tests[] matches the pattern TST-\d{3,} and is unique within this file
FR-001 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
FR-002 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
FR-003 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
FR-004 appears in at least one test's covers[] OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
No test has FR-005 in its covers[] (FR-005 is not owned by backend-api)
tasks-controller appears in at least one test's component_ref OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
digest-settings-controller appears in at least one test's component_ref OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
Every test with tier == 'unit' has a component_ref field that matches a component_id in ARCH__backend-api.yaml components[]
postgres-unavailable appears as targets_failure_mode in at least one test OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
jwt-forgery appears as targets_security_concern in at least one test OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
pii-in-logs appears as targets_security_concern in at least one test OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in test_strategy_warnings[]
Every entry in test_strategy_warnings[] matches the pattern ^WRN-\d{3,}:\s+.+
validate_schema.py exits with code 0 when run against docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml
backend-api is registered under TEST-STRATEGY.yaml container_strategies[] (the system file is updated to record the new container strategy)
digest-settings-controller is targeted by at least 2 tests via component_ref (its two declared acceptance criteria are tested separately, not collapsed into one test)

At least one test covers the tasks-controller input-validation gap from arch_warnings WRN-001 (a negative or invalid-input test on tasks-controller that is distinct from the happy-path and failure-mode tests)

The prd_warnings WRN-001 (digest idempotency / double-send risk on FR-005) is addressed: either a test references the idempotency / retry behavior, OR a WRN-NNN deferral in test_strategy_warnings[] names the double-send risk or FR-005 idempotency

The PRD edge case EDG-001 (digest run with zero open tasks) is addressed: either a test's description or acceptance references the zero-task scenario, OR a WRN-NNN deferral in test_strategy_warnings[] names EDG-001 or the zero-open-tasks condition

The tests[] list contains more than 8 items (thoroughness improvement over old skill's one-test-per-FR pattern — the full cluster including happy path, per-acceptance-criterion, boundary, invalid-input, failure-mode and security tests)
tasks-controller is targeted by at least 2 tests via component_ref (at minimum its two acceptance criteria — 201-with-id and status-flip-persists — are tested separately)
At least one test has a tier other than 'unit' (e.g. integration or security), confirming the suite is not all-unit

evals.name: next-advances-to-container
evals.prompt: Run sdlc-test in --next mode (equivalent to `/sdlc:test --next`). Starting state: docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml already exists and is complete (system mode is done); the testable container `backend-api` is READY (docs/ARCH__backend-api.yaml exists) but has NO docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml yet; the other testable containers (web-frontend, digest-worker) are NOT ready (no ARCH__<container>.yaml on disk). The --next resolver must therefore: (a) NOT re-run system mode (TEST-STRATEGY.yaml already exists), (b) skip web-frontend and digest-worker as not-ready, and (c) advance to backend-api as the next ready, testable, un-specified container. When the resolver asks for confirmation, choose 'Start backend-api'. Then run the backend-api container interview: pick the recommended (position-1) option for multiple-choice, one-line plausible free-text, accept inferred pre-fills, skip optional themes. Write docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml and run validate_schema.py until it validates. KEY CANARIES: (1) The resolver advances to backend-api and produces docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml — it must NOT create a different container's file and must NOT rewrite the existing system tests. (2) The same container coverage gate as explicit container mode applies: cover FR-001..FR-004 (or defer); target the two acceptance components tasks-controller + digest-settings-controller (or defer); exercise postgres-unavailable + jwt-forgery + pii-in-logs (or defer); every unit test has a component_ref; no test covers FR-005. (3) On first completion backend-api is registered in TEST-STRATEGY.yaml.container_strategies[]; the system file's existing tests (TST-001..TST-005) are left intact and its metadata.status stays complete.
evals.expected_output: docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml created (container_id: backend-api, status complete) — NOT a system rewrite and NOT a different container's file. Its coverage passes the trace-or-defer gate (FR-001..FR-004, the two acceptance components, postgres-unavailable, jwt-forgery, pii-in-logs each covered or deferred; no covers FR-005; every unit test carries component_ref). The pre-existing docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml still has its 5 system tests (TST-001..TST-005) and metadata.status == complete, now with backend-api registered under container_strategies[]. validate_schema.py exits 0 with [OK] complete.

assertions.text: docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml exists and can be parsed as valid YAML
docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml has container_id == 'backend-api' (not any other container)
No file named docs/TEST-STRATEGY__web-frontend.yaml or docs/TEST-STRATEGY__digest-worker.yaml was created (resolver skipped non-ready containers)
docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml still contains exactly the pre-existing system tests TST-001 through TST-005 (none removed or renumbered)
docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml metadata.status is still 'complete' after the --next run (system file was not partially overwritten)
backend-api is registered under TEST-STRATEGY.yaml container_strategies[] after the run
docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml metadata.status == 'complete'
validate_schema.py exits with code 0 when run against docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml
FR-001 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in its test_strategy_warnings[]
FR-002 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
FR-003 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
FR-004 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
No test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml has FR-005 in its covers[]
tasks-controller appears in at least one test's component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
digest-settings-controller appears in at least one test's component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
Every unit-tier test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml has a component_ref matching a component_id in ARCH__backend-api.yaml
postgres-unavailable appears as targets_failure_mode in at least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
jwt-forgery appears as targets_security_concern in at least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
pii-in-logs appears as targets_security_concern in at least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
Every tst_id in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml matches TST-\d{3,} and is unique within that file

The tst_ids in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml do not collide with the pre-existing TST-001..TST-005 in TEST-STRATEGY.yaml (container test ids are in a distinct namespace or are all higher than TST-005)
digest-settings-controller is targeted by at least 2 tests via component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml (its two acceptance criteria tested separately)

At least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml covers the tasks-controller input-validation gap from arch_warnings WRN-001 (a negative or invalid-input test distinct from happy-path and failure-mode tests)
The prd_warnings WRN-001 (digest idempotency / double-send risk) is addressed in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml by a test or a WRN-NNN deferral naming the idempotency or double-send risk
The PRD edge case EDG-001 (zero open tasks) is addressed in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml by a test referencing the zero-task scenario or a WRN-NNN deferral naming EDG-001 or zero-open-tasks
TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml tests[] contains more than 8 items (full cluster authored, not old one-per-FR pattern)
tasks-controller is targeted by at least 2 tests via component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml (its two acceptance criteria tested separately)
